news.t: 7 Best Growth ETFs to Reap the Recovery's Rewards

holdings.infoBox: NUMG is an equity ETF with a total of 43 individual holdings. The top holdings are Datadog stock at 4.40%, Lumentum Holdings at 4.10%, Comfort Systems USA at 4.10%, Ciena at 3.72%, and IDEXX Laboratories at 3.17%.

overview.description: The Nuveen ESG Mid-Cap Growth ETF (NUMG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Nuveen ESG USA Mid Cap Growth index. The fund tracks an index composed of mid-cap US companies with growth characteristics that also meet certain environmental, social, and governance criteria. NUMG was launched on Dec 13, 2016 and is issued by Nuveen.
infoTable: MSCI Nuveen ESG USA Mid Cap Growth

data.title: 7 Best Growth ETFs to Reap the Recovery's Rewards
data.text: NHL Hall of Famer Wayne Gretzky used to say, "I skate to where the puck is going to be, not to where it has been.
